prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-MLCAHNGP-875L-BLK-FBA Product Type: AXE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 12 Inch Full Tang Steel Axe Hatchet with Gut Hook Hex Holes Paracord Handle and Sheath, Black Description: Meet a compact powerhouse hatchet forged for outdoor action.

ASR Outdoor 12 Inch full tang high-carbon steel hatchet has multiple features, making it a great hand tool to pack with your outdoor gear, survival gear, camping gear, hunting gear and more.

Razor sharp steel blade with full tang durability

Paracord wrapped handle for grip and emergency

Built in gut hook to field dress like a pro

Mini pry bar and three hex holes

The ergonomic paracord wrapped handle ensures a secure grip and can be unwound for emergency use, while a sharp gut hook near the top edge offers clean and easy field dressing. A mini pry bar integrated into the lower handle makes quick work of lifting, scraping, or light demolition tasks. Plus, the handle includes three hex wrench holes for on the go adjustments, making it a compact multi tool you can count on.

Includes a black tactical sheath that securely covers the hatchet head, keeping the blade protected and ready for safe transport. Search Terms: lightweight edc camping hatchet boy scout axe beginner survival kit outdoors wilderness backpacking knives Features: - RAZOR SHARP STEEL BLADE: Forged from steel, this lightweight hatchet features a razor sharp blade and well balanced, full tang design; lanyard and fitted hatch head nylon sheath included - PARACORD WRAPPED HANDLE: Wrapped paracord handle allows for enhanced grip, while also acting as an emergency preparedness item or survival tool that can be unwound in case of injury, repair and more - BUILT IN GUT HOOK: ASR Outdoor hatchet comes with a built in gut hook designed to make field dressing tasks quick and efficient, and allows for one less tool to pack with your hunting or fishing gear - MINI PRY BAR HANDLE: Integrated into the lower handle, you’ll find a mini pry bar that makes quick work of tasks that require leverage, lifting, separating or light demolition work - BUILT IN HEX HOLES: The hatchet handle also comes with three different sized hex wrench holes for on the go adjustments of nuts and bolts, making it a compact multitool you can count on === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 12 Inch Full Tang Steel Axe Hatchet Black

anthropic.title_differentiation: Gut Hook, Paracord Handle, Mini Pry Bar, Hex Holes, Tactical Sheath, EDC Camping Survival
